description: You are a Validation Engineer at NeuroPulse Medical Systems preparing the System Requirements Specification for the 'NeuroStim X1' implantable pulse generator for an FDA audit. Create a 'Verification Traceability Matrix' at the end of the document '/home/ga/Documents/NeuroStim_SRS.odt' using the data provided in '/home/ga/Documents/trace_data.json'. The matrix must be a table with columns 'Requirement', 'Verification Protocol ID', and 'Test Method', placed under a new 'Verification Traceability Matrix' Heading 1 section. In the 'Requirement' column, insert active cross-references to the document's requirement headings rather than plain text. Save the final document to '/home/ga/Documents/NeuroStim_SRS_v2.odt'.
